title: Over to you, Messi - Mbappe leads Golden Boot race for the ages

zh.title: 坚定的图赫尔为自己的决定辩护，称失利是"我们现在要承载的伤疤"
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在紧张的新闻发布会上为球队在世界杯半决赛对阿根廷失利后的战术决定进行了辩护。图赫尔将这场失利描述为一道深深的伤口，将成为今后前进的动力。

title: 'They made him a defensive player' - Trump questions Kane role in loss
summary: Donald Trump criticizes England's World Cup semi-final tactics, questioning why Harry Kane was deployed in a defensive role during their loss to Argentina. His comments add to broader debate about England's tactical approach in the match.
content: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.

zh.title: "他们把他变成了防守型球员" - 特朗普质疑凯恩在失利中的角色
zh.summary: 特朗普批评英格兰在世界杯半决赛中的战术，质疑为什么哈里·凯恩在对阿根廷的失利中被部署在防守位置。他的评论加剧了关于英格兰比赛战术方针的广泛辩论。

title: Argentina like to leave mark on opponents - Laporte
summary: Spanish defender Aymeric Laporte warns that Argentina, ahead of the World Cup final, is known for physical, aggressive play. His comments highlight concerns about Argentina's playing style and approach against opponents.
content: Spain defender Aymeric Laporte claims World Cup final opponents Argentina are a team that "likes to leave a mark on their opponents".

zh.title: 阿根廷喜欢对对手留下印记 - 拉波尔特
zh.summary: 西班牙后卫艾梅里克·拉波尔特警告说，在世界杯决赛前，阿根廷以身体对抗和侵略性踢法而闻名。他的言论突出了对阿根廷比赛风格和对阵对手方式的担忧。
